data.title: Intel Shares Have Dropped 47% In The Past Year, Now Chipmaker Faces China AI Chip Curbs Just Like Nvidia Amid Trade Tensions
data.description: Intel has joined Nvidia in facing new U.S. export restrictions on AI chips to China, contributing to a nearly 47% drop in its stock over the past year amid escalating U.S.-China trade tensions.

data.title: Scott Bessent Warns Of 'Serious Risk' To Anyone Buying Iran Oil — Crude Moves Up, US Futures And Nikkei Post Modest Gains
data.description: U.S. stock futures posted modest gains on Wednesday night, recovering from a steep decline in the afternoon session following Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell's latest comments on the market, tariffs, and inflation.

data.title: Charlie Munger Once Said Warren Buffett Is A 'Learning Machine' And That's What Lies Beneath Berkshire Hathaway's Success From One Decade To Another
data.description: In his 2007 USC speech, Charlie Munger highlighted Warren Buffett's lifelong learning as the key to Berkshire Hathaway's success, stressing that continuous education is essential for long-term growth and achievement.

data.title: NBA Icon Shaq Says A Text From His Mom Saying 'Good Job, Baby' Matters More To Him Than Making $15 Million Off A Business Deal
Cathie Wood's Crypto Shuffle: Pours $5.2 Million Into Newly Listed Solana Staking Fund, Dumps Bitcoin ETF And Buys Robinhood Dip
